        print(f"  {n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} pos={n['boundary'][0]}")

# Compare with previous frame

    nodes_before = previous_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    print("\nBefore click:")
    for n in nodes_before:
        if n['pixels'] < 100:

</parameter>
</function>
